title: Configurable internal API
changes: New Settings > General > Internal API section for choosing the panel's HTTP port and whether other devices on the network can reach it.
Backend startup respects the saved port and network policy so both dev and packaged builds honour the choice.
Electron main process reads the same settings first so the desktop shell polls the correct port.
Updated application versioning to 2.7.0.

title: Advanced features and API Tester
changes: New Advanced features settings tab to enable or disable optional panel tools.
AI Chat is now an optional feature: when disabled, its page and settings are hidden but stay saved.
New API Tester feature for sending HTTP requests to local or external APIs and inspecting the response.
New Tests and Connectivity feature for probing a device by IP and port over TCP, HTTP, HTTPS, or ping.
AI Chat provider, model, base URL, and API key settings moved to the Advanced features tab.
Reduced the initial application bundle by code-splitting secondary views and removing unused dependencies.
Updated application versioning to 2.6.0.

title: Dashboard layout modes and internal HomePage server
changes: Dashboard layout modes: present instances as large cards or as a compact list.
Internal HomePage served by the application, with no external Apache, showing live instance status and following the selected layout, theme, and accent color.
Replaceable HomePage: keep the built-in template, upload a custom HTML page, or point to a custom URL.
Optional custom web link per instance, with the link action hidden when no port or web link is set.
Advanced instance settings stay hidden when editing instances that never enabled them.
More reliable portable executable export with a correctly embedded application icon.
Updated application versioning to 2.5.0.

title: Expanded language support
changes: Added German, Spanish, and Japanese to the language selector.
Translated the main interface, navigation, settings, AI Chat, About, and Patch Files labels from the English source text.
Updated HTML language metadata for each available language.
Added translated patch note entries for the new languages.
Restructured README into focused documentation guides.
Regenerated screenshots for dashboard, settings, language selector, Patch Files, AI Chat, and About.
Documented user workflows, configuration, localization, development, testing, release, and security guidance.
Updated application versioning to 2.4.1.

title: Project structure and executable icon hardening
changes: Split backend defaults, instance import validation, settings normalization, system log export, and patch note parsing into dedicated server modules.
Split Settings dialogs and patch text translations into smaller frontend files.
Changed the Electron desktop runtime to use a portable user-data and cache directory beside the executable.
Kept the packaged executable icon aligned with the project cube icon.
Applied the app version metadata to the portable executable during packaging.
Updated application versioning to 2.4.0.

title: Application icon and patch notes reliability
changes: Applied the project cube image as the Electron window and packaged executable icon.
Updated the portable packaging script to copy patch notes and project patch summary files.
Added a Patch Files fallback that renders version notes from PROJECT_PATCH_SUMMARY.md when patch-notes.json is unavailable.
Updated application versioning to 2.3.1.

title: System styling and import stability
changes: Added a Style tab in Settings for light and dark themes.
Added custom accent color selection with free color input and preset swatches.
Persisted appearance settings through the backend settings file.
Applied the selected accent color to buttons, active navigation states, cards, and form focus states.
Reset stale dashboard selection and side panels after importing instances.
Updated application versioning to 2.3.0.

title: Patch summary rendering and translations
changes: Connected PROJECT_PATCH_SUMMARY.md to the Patch Files page.
Converted the project patch summary file to English-first content.
Added an About system page with translated content and GitHub links.
Added backend parsing for patch summary sections, current version, date, and main area.
Added translated interface labels for the patch summary metadata and known sections.
Included PROJECT_PATCH_SUMMARY.md in the packaged application files.

title: Instance import, backup, and patch documentation
changes: Added instance configuration tools to General settings.
Added JSON import support for configuring multiple instances at once.
Added JSON backup download for the current instance configuration.
Added backend validation and system logs for instance import and backup actions.
Added a project patch summary file to make future GitHub commits easier to prepare.

title: Structured settings and patch detail view
changes: Reorganized General settings into clear HomePage, AI Chat, and system overview categories.
Kept Settings and Patch Files headers fixed while only tab and page content scrolls.
Made recent Git commit entries clickable in Patch Files.
Added commit detail panels with hash, date, subject, and extended descriptions when available.
Updated the application versioning flow for release 2.1.0.

title: Control Panel navigation and secure utility pages
changes: Added sidebar navigation for Home, HomePage, AI Chat, Patch Files, and Settings.
Added configurable HomePage URL in General settings.
Added AI Chat page with server-side provider configuration and bounded chat context.
Added Patch Files page with version notes and recent Git commit history.
Added system log export filters, multiple log formats, and optional cleanup after download.
Moved destructive instance deletion to Settings only.

title: Service cards and execution dashboard
changes: Added service card grid layout.
Added terminal viewer beside selected services.
Added instance creation and editing panel.
Added enable and disable controls for instances.
Added local system logs.
